title: Why Packaging Corporation of America Shares Are Soaring Today
text: Demand for packaged goods and delivery boxes remains brisk even though consumers are no longer locking themselves in at home.

title: Packaging Corporation of America Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Results
text: LAKE FOREST, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) today reported fourth quarter 2021 net income of $217 million, or $2.28 per share, and net income of $262 million, or $2.76 per share, excluding special items. Fourth quarter net sales were $2.0 billion in 2021 and $1.7 billion in 2020. title: What's in the Cards for Packaging Corp's (PKG) Q4 Earnings?
text: Packaging Corp's (PKG) Q4 performance is likely to reflect benefits from solid packaging demand for essential products and strong containerboard and corrugated products demand.

title: Packaging Corp. (PKG) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
